correctness.justification: All behavior and name claims verified; minor slip: PostPage is at line 17, not line 7 (line 7 is the ReportView import).

coverage.justification: Catches the high-impact issues (ReportView, PostPage, idBySlug, gutter, incr, Header) and flags consistent patterns worth standardizing.

prioritization.justification: Critical tier correctly holds the most misleading names (ReportView side effect, PostPage wrong domain); idBySlug arguably belongs in critical given its silent misdirection.

actionability.justification: Every finding has a concrete replacement name, exact file path, and is safe to mechanically apply.

rationale.justification: Each item has a terse 'Reason' line grounded in principle or convention, though some rationales are thin (e.g., 'Colloquial' for socials).

signal_density.justification: Tight format with no filler; structured table-like entries where every line carries information.

fabrications: Claims `PostPage` is at `app/projects/[slug]/page.tsx:7`; the function is declared on line 17 (line 7 is an import).
overall_notes: A compact, high-signal report that correctly identifies the most consequential naming problems (ReportView masking a side effect, PostPage using wrong domain vocabulary, idBySlug actually returning a display number). Suggestions are concrete and ready to apply. One minor line-number slip and slightly shallow rationale on the Minor tier are the main nits.
